name: ai-engineering-workflow
description: Agent-neutral AI engineering team runtime with global memory, workflow gates, and traceable change history.

scripts.check: node --check bin/ai-engineering.mjs && find src tests -name '*.mjs' -print -exec node --check {} \;
scripts.smoke: node ./bin/ai-engineering.mjs init && node ./bin/ai-engineering.mjs create-goal --title "Smoke goal" --description "Verify runtime wiring" && node ./bin/ai-engineering.mjs scan && node ./bin/ai-engineering.mjs role --role pm && node ./bin/ai-engineering.mjs export
